title: Bare Bones Axolotl Buckets
description: A Bare Bones resource pack for axolotl buckets (no mods needed)
body:
Another axolotl buckets resource pack for [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones), but this one **doesn't require** [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home), [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn), or something else! Unfortunately there is no different texture for the babies, they'll show up the same as the adults.

Just small and simple :)

![Lucy, Wild, Gold, Cyan, Blue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d84764ebd4cffe483de23f74adf6f3b9459c492.png)
